headline: Nvidia beats expectations again as AI boom drives revenue surge, but shares slip
summary: The world's most valuable company beat forecasts as revenues jumped 85%. Yet rising competition and efforts to diversify beyond big tech left investors cautious, sending shares lower in late trading.View on euronews

headline: FactSet Valutico Alliance Targets Private Market Valuations And Investor Returns
summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) has partnered with Valutico to deliver an integrated valuation workflow for private capital markets. The collaboration connects portfolio monitoring, modeling, and reporting within a single workflow for private market investors. The combined offering targets more frequent, transparent, and institution-grade valuations for private assets. FactSet, a long-established data and analytics provider to institutional investors, is extending its reach further into...
